extortion.description: [AI generated] Paradise Schools is a network of K-12 charter schools located in Surprise, Arizona. The organization, established in 1997, comprises three schools - Paradise Honors High School, Paradise Honors Middle School, and Paradise Education Center. It offers a comprehensive curriculum aligned with state and national standards. The student-centric institution strives to cultivate creativity, critical thinking, leadership, and character development in a safe and inclusive environment.
